programmes.show_description: Velasco asks Benson for help in finding three girls who were trafficked from his hometown to New York City.
Rollins and Fin investigate an assault in Kentucky that has striking similarities to that of a victim found in Central Park. Benson receives intel that turns the case upside down.
The SVU faces the fury of social media fans when they arrest two popular influencer brothers.
Amaro and Olivia's ex-boyfriend Burton Lowe ask SVU for help with overturning a wrongful conviction in one of Cragen's old cases.
When a New York fire fighter is found stabbed to death, the ensuing investigation and questioning launches Detectives Logan and Wheeler into a brawl with the fire department.
A deputy questions a driver about why his broken-down car looks like it's been in an accident. A young man looking for a fresh start falls on hard times.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Moonlighting: When a murder is committed during a polygraph specialist's night job, the team has to find out what really happened.
Obsession: Crime drama series. DiNozzo becomes obsessed with finding a woman whose brother has been murdered, while the team searches for the killer.
Crime drama series. The NCIS get a surprising revelation while trying to track down a serial killer. McGee joins Abby south of the border, where she is giving a speech.
Briscoe and Green investigate the murder of a successful stockbroker, who was conducting affairs with a mother and her daughter.
When an off-duty police officer is shot, detectives Briscoe and Green investigate whether the victim was targeted because of her uniform.
When a cab driver is found stabbed to death under his taxi, Briscoe and Green discover that his last fare was a former convict and aspiring writer.
Identity: Police drama. After a young executive is found dead, the investigation suggests identity theft when it transpires that the man had lost his job but gained $400,000.
Floater: Police drama series. Briscoe and Green investigate a body in the river, leading to a corruption scandal involving lawyers and a judge.
Embedded: Police drama series. When a reporter embedded in Iraq reveals too much about his unit's position and is shot on returning to New York, suspicion falls on the army.
Ships in the Night: US crime drama series. The NCIS team partners the Coast Guard Investigative Service when they investigate the murder of a marine on a dinner boat cruise.
Recruited: US crime drama series. When a recruitment session of a petty officer results in murder, the NCIS team sets out to find the culprit by teaming up with Ducky's predecessor.
Freedom: US crime drama series. The NCIS team has to locate both the family and the murderer when a Marine is found beaten to death in his own backyard.
Mysterious criminal mastermind The Voice returns and traps Reese and Fusco in their own precinct with several armed gang members and the latest POI. Root makes a shocking discovery.
Finch's number comes up when his cover identity is blown and sets off a deadly series of encounters with Samaritan's operatives.
Garland asks Benson to reopen a missing persons case that he worked as a rookie officer. A victim in one of Carisi's recent cases is arrested.
When a student's school reports a girl missing, the squad must track down a trusted family friend for answers. Benson gets a Mother's Day surprise.
An investigation into the disappearance of sex workers leads SVU to a horrifying discovery. Rollins and Velasco find a clue among neglected missing persons reports.
A 17-year-old leads her rap crew to a rival's hideout under the guise of a hookup text. When Homicide gets involved, the level of her involvement comes into question.
Dylan and Lizzie work to uncover why an Olympic-hopeful figure skater is killed while on the ice. Ryan's case lands him and Dylan in unusual circumstances.
Two men acting strangely in a gas station draw the suspicion of an employee. A mum calls the cops when her daughter throws water on her.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Erin helps a former witness shut down a drug operation in his apartment building.
Danny and Baez team up with two Russian operatives to search for a dangerous Russian man who entered the U.S. on a diplomatic visa.
A Mexican drug cartel targets Danny when he intercepts a shipment of several million dollars; Jaime goes after a serial killer who preys on the elderly.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Danny contemplates retiring until Erin enlists him to help her with a case involving her ex-husband. Jamie and Eddie go undercover as a couple. Frank butts heads with the new mayor.
Frank battles with the mayor about a community parade that is honouring a once-convicted cop bomber. Jamie and Eddy stumble upon a misleading congressman.
Callen, Hanna and the team search for a group of terrorist leaders suspected of murdering an ex-army sergeant.
After an antiques dealer is murdered, the team begin a mission to recover a black book containing top secret information.
The team continues their search for the missing black book.
The team must rely on a former Navy Intelligence Officer with post-traumatic stress to help them close a case.
The team is called in when a dead body carrying a highly-classified residue, used to track persons of interest, is stolen from an autopsy room.
The team are tasked with tracking down Matt Driscoll, a member of the Navy who has been leaking highly confidential information.
Sam goes undercover in prison to investigate a highly secretive terror group. Callen uncovers and pursues a clue to his past.
Ryan and Dylan get their biggest lead in the Sleeping Beauty Killer case, taking them to a faceoff aboard a ship. Dylan receives troubling news from his father.
When the only evidence in a crime is through a church confession, Carisi must find another way to prove his suspect guilty. Benson agrees to meet an old friend seeking to make amends.
